commit_scope: Promote the satsang guidance carrier from a Mac-only single-pane app into a shared tabbed native SwiftUI body with macOS and iPhone entry points, iPhone/iOS host-resource carrier declarations, and updated Form proof for the four-platform host boundary.

commands: form-cli ask "satsang native app single tabbed modes iPhone iOS host carrier shared Form body mac windows android"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-cli-router.fk form-stdlib/form-cli-judge.fk form-stdlib/form-cli-sufficiency.fk form-stdlib/satsang-listen-route.fk form-stdlib/tests/satsang-listen-route-band.fk
local_validation.fourth_arm: satsang-guidance-event-band.fk -> 255, satsang-host-boundary-band.fk -> 1048575, satsang-listen-route-band.fk -> 255, satsang-room-memory-band.fk -> 255; each output included 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '0 divergent'.
local_validation.summary: Startup gate passed on a fresh worktree. form-cli ask used the native route but had no grounded/sufficient local RAG hit for this exact tabbed iPhone carrier shape, then observed the fkwu+Metal model-cell witness. Swift tests passed with 12 XCTest cases, including the single tabbed mode receipt and the macOS/Windows/Android/iOS carrier matrix. Both Swift package app products built, and scripts/build_satsang_mac_app.sh produced the packaged macOS app. Xcode lists the SatsangGuidancePhone scheme, but the generic iOS build is blocked on this host because iOS 26.2 platform support is not installed; device signing/archive remains outside this source patch.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy yet; this is a local native app carrier/source change awaiting PR checks.

phase_gate.reason: Local source and Form proof passed; CI, PR checks, and signed iPhone/device archive are pending.

e2e_validation.summary: The native Apple app now has one shared tabbed SwiftUI body. macOS launches SatsangGuidance; iPhone launches SatsangGuidancePhone. The shared Room tab keeps live capture primary and Speech as the side channel, while the Resources tab exposes the four-platform host carrier receipt.
e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The previous Mac-only single-window content view is now a shared tabbed app shell. The host-boundary receipt now includes iPhone/iOS with AVFoundation, Speech, app-sandbox file carriers, and an embedded Form runtime adapter for the process protocol.
test_flows: swift build --package-path experiments/satsang-mac-app --product SatsangGuidance -> product built
swift build --package-path experiments/satsang-mac-app --product SatsangGuidancePhone -> product built
xcodebuild -scheme SatsangGuidancePhone -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -> blocked because iOS 26.2 platform support is not installed
make wellness -> passed; source maps and edited durable docs aligned
